title: Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - The Mossel Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Video","html":"Breaking News\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - The Mossel Bay Police have opened a case of murder and theft of a motor vehicle following the death of a 62-year-old woman in Crook Street near the town centre today, 1 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS AND VIDEO - The Mossel Bay Police have opened a case of murder and theft of a motor vehicle following the death of a 62-year-old woman in Crook Street near the town centre today, 1 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, says the police were deployed to the victim’s flat at Ocean View at about 11:00.","html":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, says the police were deployed to the victim’s flat at Ocean View at about 11:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They had to force open the door and discovered the victim’s body with an open wound to the neck."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The medical personnel declared her dead on the scene.","html":"The medical personnel declared her dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Crime scene experts combed the flat for clues, while follow-up investigations led the police to Moonie Street in KwaNonqaba, where the victim’s vehicle was found abandoned.","html":"Crime scene experts combed the flat for clues, while follow-up investigations led the police to Moonie Street in KwaNonqaba, where the victim’s vehicle was found abandoned."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"VIDEO:","html":"VIDEO:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies says more charges could be added as the case unfolds; however, the suspect remains at large.","html":"Spies says more charges could be added as the case unfolds; however, the suspect remains at large."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The identity of the victim has not yet been released.","html":"The identity of the victim has not yet been released."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Anyone with information may contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Francois Pick, on 079 893 9937 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay police on the scene where a woman was murdered. Photo: Louise Karsten","html":"Mossel Bay police on the scene where a woman was murdered. Photo: Louise Karsten "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
